import React from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './Footer.css'; const Footer = () => { return (

Hours

  • Saturday: 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM
  • Sunday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM

); }; export default Footer;
